titleStmt.title: SII 26.514: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 514. (A.R. No. 487 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same verandah.

p.hi: Jaṭāvarman Tribhº Parākramapāṇḍyadēva: Ś. 1244 and 8th year, Mithuna (Āṉi) 28, śu. 15, Wednesday, Chittirai = 1322 A.D., June 23. The tithi was śu. 8.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records that the mahāsabhai of Śrī [•••••] maṅgalam alias Taṉiyāṉai [Vīra]pāṇḍyach chaturvvēḍimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam, in Āri-nāḍu, sold some land comprising Śakaranēri in the southern quarter of their village, as kārāṅmaichchenmam to a certain Suriyadēvaṉ Tampikku Nallaperumal alias Piḷḷai Sundarapāṇḍya Vāṇakōvaraiyar, an [Agappāvīrar] mudali of the king, of Aṟukkai Kuṉṟattūr in Āṇmā-nāḍu, and as vāḍāk-kaḍamai to the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Śōḻapuram in Āṇmā-nāḍu. It is stated that the mahāsabhai sold the village of Śakaranēri for 500 paṇam and granted all the taxes, etc., that it yielded to the temple of the god mentioned above and had ordered the transfer of the land to the grants of lands of the temple after removing it from the village of the sabhai. A number of signatories are listed at the end.
The engraver on stone was Sambandaṉ Appaṉ alias Vīraviṉōda Achāriyaṉ the śiṟpāchāriyaṉ of the same nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakābtam Āyirattu Iruṉūṟṟu nāṟpattu nāliṉmel śrīkoccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīparākramapāṇṭiyatevarkuyāṇṭu A mitunāyaṟṟu 2 10 8 tiyum paurṇaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cittirai nāḷ Ārināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī maṅkalamāṉa taṉiyāṉai virapāṇṭiyaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Āṇmānāṭṭuc coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvararkku kāṇivilaipra- māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu I vum Āṇmānāṭṭu Aṟukai kuṉṟattūr perumāḷ Akappāvirar mutalikaḷil cūriyatevaṉ tampikkunalla perumāḷāṉa piḷaḷai cuntarapāṇṭiya vāṇakovaraiyaṟku kārāmaic ceṉmamākavum Iṉnāyiṉāṟku vāṭā
kkaṭamaiyākavum viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷamum puravumāvatu Eṅkaḷūr teṉpiṭākai cakaranerikkup peruṉāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai śrīvallava l nāṭṭu nelluvitai taṅ nāṅkaḷ kaṭamaikoṇṭu pokiṟa peruvarampukku meṟkum teṉṉellai vākaik kuḷattukku vaṭavellaikku nāṭṭiṉa tiruvāḻikkallukkum vaṇṇa Eri vaṭavellaikku vaṭakkum melellai Appaneri kotai kuḻi kiḻellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai cakaraneriyil vaṭake ppeṟṟa cevvaikkum śrīvallava nirpāykiṟa Āṟṟukkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparuppum ṉañcaiyum nattamum nattappālum maraṅkaḷum kiṇaṟukaḷum toṭṭamum toṭṭakkollaikaḷum kāṭum Oṭaiyum miṉpaṭupaḷḷa
mum teṉpaṭupetumpum cuṭukāṭu vaḻi meṭṭuttuṟaiyum puṟṟukoṟaiyum maṟṟumeṟ peṟpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahā- sabhaiyom Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilil Āticaṇḍe śvara(r)ṟku tampikkunallaperumāḷāṉa piḷḷai cuntarapāṇṭiya vāṇakovaraiyaṟku kāraāṇmai ceṉmamākavum Ināyiṉāṟku Eṟperpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷilum vāṭākkaṭamai Āṇṭoṉṟukku kārum pacāṉamum Uṭpaṭa Irācipācaṉa kuḷikai �ka kaṭamaiyāka Iṟuttuppotuvarākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta cakaranerikku perāṟṟil niṉṟum nirpāykiṟa teṉkompilk kālum vaṭakkompilk kālum nirpāyvitākavum Āka Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ikkuḷa
ttil samasta prāptikaḷukkum Emmilicainta vilai niccayitta Irācipācaṉa kuḷikai paṇam 500 Ippaṇam Aiññūṟum kaiyile paṟṟikkoṇṭu peruṉāṉkellaikaḷilum tiruccūlastāpanamum paṇṇi vilaikkuṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Intac cakaranerikkup peruṉāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlasthāpanam paṇṇikkuṭuttamaikkum kaṭamai viniyokam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum tavuntu Āticaṇḍeśvaraṟku tirukkaimma ttuk kuṭuttamaikkum viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Intaccakaraneri Eṅkaḷūriliṉiṉṟum variyil piṟintu Āṇmānāṭṭuc coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya
nāyiṉār koḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku tiruvāyk tirumukamum koṇṭu candrādityavarai celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilil Āti- caṇḍeśvaraṟku Ivai peru Āriyūr yajñamutti Eḻuttu Ivai naphra Elāttaṉai napattaṇḍarāmaṉ paṇṇaiyarāñ Āḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvariyūr Umaiyāḻvāṉ tevarkaḷ tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai sālai vaṭameruna koyiṟ śrīkāśyapaṉ brahaspati
sahayājiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai perumnallūr Irāmapirāṉ caṅkentaṉāṉa Ettu nārāyaṇaṉ pacalai yajñamutti Eḻuttu Ivai peruvariyūr yajñamutti jāt- vedaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cāttaṉūr viravinotaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pacalai śrī kraṣṇaṉ śrīrāghavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ci nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvariyūr śrīkriṣṇaṉ periyanampi Eḻuttu Ivai komapuratti viṟṟiruntāṉ Eḻuttu tirukkaṭavūr cāttaṉūrccaṅkata mukaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pacalai tirumāliruñcolai niṉṟa nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvariyūr yajñamutti Uṭai yāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvariyūr śrīkṛṣṇaṉ tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkapuṟa
ttu śrīnarasiṅhaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iṟaiṅku naṟaiyūr Aḻakaṉ Eḻuttu sabhai- yār Aruḷicceyalpaṭi Intakkārāṇmai vilaipramāṇam Eḻutineṉ sabhai kaṇakku kha peruṅkoyiluṭaiyaāṉ Eḻuttu Inta śilālekhyam paṇṇineṉ Ināṭṭu cippāccāriyaṉ campantaṉ Appaṉāṉa viraviṉota Ācāriyaṉ Iprasādam Iṭṭucceyvitteṉum Ivai viraviṉota Ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.514 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
